description: Environment setup: verify existing build is green before making changes. Run TypeScript check and Vite build, confirm zero errors baseline.
steps: Run npx tsc -b --noEmit and confirm zero errors
Run npx vite build and confirm successful output
Run npm audit to identify known vulnerabilities
acceptance_criteria: TypeScript type check passes with zero errors
verification: npx vite build exits with code 0
findings: Baseline is green: tsc passes (0 errors), vite build succeeds. npm audit shows 2 moderate vulnerabilities in esbuild (dev dependency only, affects dev server not production). Vite 5 -> 8 is a breaking change; esbuild vuln only affects local dev server, not deployed site. Will upgrade vite to latest 5.x or 6.x non-breaking patch if available, otherwise document as dev-only risk.
